scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run copy-assets
scripts.build:dev: tsc && vite build --mode development && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/tldraw-assets && cp -r node_modules/@tldraw/assets/icons dist/tldraw-assets/icons && cp -r node_modules/@tldraw/assets/fonts dist/tldraw-assets/ && cp -r node_modules/@tldraw/assets/translations dist/tldraw-assets/ && cp -r node_modules/@tldraw/assets/embed-icons dist/tldraw-assets/
